$schema: Sources catalog for AI Worldview — what we load, what we show, what we don't

sources.name: ADS-B Military (adsb.lol / adsb.fi / airplanes.live)

auth.limits: Keyless; ~1 req/s per feed. adsb.lol ODbL; airplanes.live/adsb.fi non-commercial. User accepts provider terms (BYOK/self-host).

sources.notes: Authoritative military airframes (readsb dbFlags bit 1) that OpenSky does not flag or fully cover. Unioned by icao24 across feeds, tagged subtype=military, merged into the Aircraft layer. Carries registration + type code for identification.

fields_loaded_not_displayed.icao24: stored in meta, used as ID but not shown as separate field in HUD
fields_loaded_not_displayed.callsign: used to fetch route but raw callsign not shown as dedicated field

fields_available_not_loaded.on_ground: boolean — whether aircraft is on ground. Could filter parked aircraft
fields_available_not_loaded.vertical_rate: m/s climb/descent rate. Could show ascending/descending indicator
fields_available_not_loaded.squawk: transponder code (e.g. 7700=emergency, 7600=radio failure, 7500=hijack). HIGH VALUE for situational awareness
fields_available_not_loaded.spi: Special Position Indicator flag — triggered by pilot. Could highlight distress
fields_available_not_loaded.geo_altitude: geometric altitude (vs barometric). More accurate at high altitudes
fields_available_not_loaded.sensors: array of sensor IDs that detected this aircraft. Could show data quality
fields_available_not_loaded.category: aircraft category (0-20): large, small, rotorcraft, glider, UAV, space vehicle, etc. MUCH better classification than our name-based heuristic
fields_available_not_loaded.last_contact: unix timestamp of last message. Could compute staleness/age of data
fields_available_not_loaded.time_position: unix timestamp of last position update. Data freshness indicator

api_capabilities_not_used.tracks_endpoint: GET /tracks/all?icao24=X — last 30 days of flight tracks (we only use for selected aircraft)
api_capabilities_not_used.flights_endpoint: GET /flights/all — all flights in time range, arrivals/departures by airport
api_capabilities_not_used.metadata_endpoint: GET /metadata/aircraft/icao24/X — aircraft registration, model, manufacturer, owner

durability.scope: post-throttle latest accepted position fix per MMSI before DB flush
durability.loss_model: Raw websocket PositionReport messages suppressed by throttle are not stored. Accepted post-throttle fixes are appended to WAL before the memory flush buffer and recovered on restart.

fields_loaded_not_displayed.speed: loaded and shown in HUD, but NOT used to scale visual
fields_loaded_not_displayed.heading: loaded and shown in HUD

fields_available_not_loaded.Name: vessel name from ShipStaticData. HIGH VALUE — currently we only show MMSI number
fields_available_not_loaded.CallSign: radio call sign. Useful for identification
fields_available_not_loaded.ImoNumber: International Maritime Organization number. Permanent vessel identifier (MMSI can change)
fields_available_not_loaded.NavigationalStatus: 0=under way using engine, 1=at anchor, 2=not under command, 3=restricted maneuverability, 5=moored, 6=aground, 7=engaged in fishing, 8=under way sailing, 14=AIS-SART (man overboard!). CRITICAL for situational awareness
fields_available_not_loaded.Cog: Course Over Ground — actual track direction (vs heading which is bow direction). Shows crabbing/drift
fields_available_not_loaded.Destination: reported destination port. HIGH VALUE for intelligence
fields_available_not_loaded.Eta: Estimated Time of Arrival. Combined with destination gives full route picture
fields_available_not_loaded.MaximumStaticDraught: how deep the hull sits. Indicates cargo load
fields_available_not_loaded.Dimension.A: distance from bow to GPS antenna (meters). A+B = total length
fields_available_not_loaded.Dimension.B: distance from GPS antenna to stern (meters). A+B = total length
fields_available_not_loaded.Dimension.C: distance from port side to GPS antenna (meters). C+D = beam width
fields_available_not_loaded.Dimension.D: distance from GPS antenna to starboard (meters). C+D = beam width
fields_available_not_loaded.SpecialManoeuvreIndicator: flag for special maneuver in progress
fields_available_not_loaded.Timestamp: seconds within UTC minute of report. Data freshness

api_capabilities_not_used.area_filtering: WebSocket subscription can filter by bounding box regions
api_capabilities_not_used.ship_type_filtering: can subscribe to specific ship types only
api_capabilities_not_used.mmsi_filtering: can track specific vessels by MMSI list

fields_available_not_loaded.predicted_position: could extrapolate from last heading+speed where vessel likely is now
fields_available_not_loaded.historical_pattern: could compare current gap to vessel's typical behavior patterns

sources.name: Space-Track → CelesTrak → Ivan TLE (3-source chain) + Spectator Earth
sources.provider: Space-Track.org (US Space Command, primary) → CelesTrak (mirror, fallback) → tle.ivanstanojevic.me (JSON API, last resort) + Spectator Earth (sensor enrichment)

live_contract.notes: Replace-on-refresh layer; lifecycle is managed by latest projection refresh rather than stale removal.

space_track.note: Optional. If set, used as primary source (most authoritative). Falls back to CelesTrak/Ivan if not set.

celestrak.note: Public, but rate-limits aggressively (403 bans possible)

ivan_tle.note: Free JSON API, 24K+ sats, no auth, last resort fallback

spectator.note: Enriches ~55 sats with sensor specs. Without it, no footprint cones.

map_visual.recon: amber eye icon override at 1.8x scale

fields_loaded_not_displayed.noradId: stored in entity properties but never shown in HUD
fields_loaded_not_displayed.reconMeta.country: stored but not shown in HUD
fields_loaded_not_displayed.sensor.platform: Spectator platform name, stored but unused
fields_loaded_not_displayed.sensor.open: whether imagery is open-access, stored but unused

fields_available_not_loaded.COUNTRY_CODE: CelesTrak GP JSON format includes country code of operator. Better than name heuristic
fields_available_not_loaded.LAUNCH_DATE: launch date of satellite. Context for age/generation
fields_available_not_loaded.OBJECT_TYPE: PAYLOAD, ROCKET BODY, DEBRIS, UNKNOWN. Could filter debris vs active
fields_available_not_loaded.RCS_SIZE: radar cross section: SMALL/MEDIUM/LARGE. Physical size indicator
fields_available_not_loaded.PERIOD: orbital period in minutes. Useful for orbit type classification
fields_available_not_loaded.APOAPSIS: highest orbit point (km). Orbit shape characterization
fields_available_not_loaded.PERIAPSIS: lowest orbit point (km). Orbit shape characterization
fields_available_not_loaded.INCLINATION: embedded in TLE but not extracted as human-readable field. Polar vs equatorial indication
fields_available_not_loaded.DECAY_DATE: predicted re-entry date for decaying satellites
fields_available_not_loaded.BSTAR: drag coefficient — indicates how fast orbit is decaying

api_capabilities_not_used.celestrak_gp_json: JSON/XML GP format with rich metadata (vs raw TLE). Includes country, launch date, RCS, object type
api_capabilities_not_used.celestrak_supplemental: TLE for classified objects (analyst-derived orbits for spy satellites)
api_capabilities_not_used.celestrak_satcat: full satellite catalog with international designator, launch info, decay status
api_capabilities_not_used.spectator_sensor_footprints: sensor footprint metadata for selected commercial/open satellites
api_capabilities_not_used.spectator_pass_metadata: pass and platform metadata that can enrich satellite footprint visualization

sources.name: Space-Track GP_HISTORY — Targeted Historical Orbital Elements

auth.limits: Account terms and request limits apply; use targeted NORAD/time windows.

map_visual.tleLine1/2: Imported into core.orbital_elements; replay computes positions locally from stored epochs.

fields_available_not_loaded.OMM: raw OMM/Alpha-5 parsing is a separate roadmap item

live_contract.notes: GDACS MAP endpoint returns the current bulletin collection; OpenSpy replaces the live disaster view on each poll while canonical event snapshots remain append/idempotent in storage.

map_visual.eventType: icon body shape (earthquake ripples, cyclone spiral, etc.)

fields_available_not_loaded.alertscore: numeric severity score. Could rank/sort events
fields_available_not_loaded.episodealertscore: episode-level severity. Distinguishes ongoing vs one-off
fields_available_not_loaded.severity: detailed severity metadata (displaced population, damage level)
fields_available_not_loaded.population_affected: estimated affected population. HIGH VALUE for impact assessment
fields_available_not_loaded.country: affected country. Could use for country-level aggregation
fields_available_not_loaded.url: link to full GDACS event page with detailed reports, maps, satellite imagery
fields_available_not_loaded.fromdate/todate: event time range. Could show event timeline/duration
fields_available_not_loaded.resources: links to situation reports, maps, satellite damage assessments

api_capabilities_not_used.resources_endpoint: /api/events/getresources — satellite imagery, reports, maps per event
api_capabilities_not_used.geometry_endpoint: detailed polygon geometry for flood extents, cyclone tracks
api_capabilities_not_used.rss_feed: real-time RSS feed for instant alerts
api_capabilities_not_used.event_episodes: track event evolution over time (cyclone track progression)

fields_available_not_loaded.depth: earthquake depth in km. Shallow quakes (<10km) are far more destructive. CRITICAL for impact assessment
fields_available_not_loaded.felt: number of DYFI (Did You Feel It?) reports. Indicates actual human impact
fields_available_not_loaded.cdi: Community Decimal Intensity — actual experienced shaking intensity
fields_available_not_loaded.mmi: Modified Mercalli Intensity — estimated shaking intensity from model
fields_available_not_loaded.alert: PAGER alert level (green/yellow/orange/red) — official USGS impact assessment. Already computed!
fields_available_not_loaded.tsunami: boolean tsunami warning flag. CRITICAL for coastal situational awareness
fields_available_not_loaded.sig: significance score (0-1000). Combines magnitude + impact + felt reports
fields_available_not_loaded.magType: magnitude type (ml, mb, mw). Mw is most reliable for large quakes
fields_available_not_loaded.status: reviewed vs automatic. Quality flag for data reliability
fields_available_not_loaded.url: link to full USGS event page with shakemap, PAGER assessment
fields_available_not_loaded.detail: URL to detailed GeoJSON with ShakeMap, PAGER, moment tensor data
fields_available_not_loaded.gap: azimuthal gap — larger gaps mean less well-constrained location
fields_available_not_loaded.nst: number of stations used. Data quality indicator
fields_available_not_loaded.dmin: distance to nearest station. Closer = better location accuracy
fields_available_not_loaded.updated: last update timestamp. Shows if event parameters were revised

api_capabilities_not_used.shakemap: ShakeMap contour data showing predicted ground shaking intensity by area
api_capabilities_not_used.pager: PAGER estimated fatalities and economic losses
api_capabilities_not_used.moment_tensor: focal mechanism — shows fault orientation and rupture type
api_capabilities_not_used.historical_queries: search earthquakes by date range, magnitude range, area

sources.name: NASA EONET — Earth Observatory Natural Events

fields_available_not_loaded.link: URL to full NASA event page
fields_available_not_loaded.closed: date event was declared over — could show event duration
fields_available_not_loaded.sources: array of data source URLs (NASA, GDACS, USGS, etc.) with direct links
fields_available_not_loaded.magnitudeValue: event magnitude (e.g. fire radiative power, storm wind speed)
fields_available_not_loaded.geometry_history: multiple geometry entries over time — tracks event movement (e.g. storm track)

api_capabilities_not_used.category_filter: filter by event category (wildfires, storms, volcanoes, etc.)
api_capabilities_not_used.date_range: query historical events by date range
api_capabilities_not_used.closed_events: include resolved events for historical analysis

sources.name: ACLED — Armed Conflict Location & Event Data

auth.method: email + API key, or explicit password OAuth

fields_loaded_not_displayed.sub_event_type: stored but not used for visual differentiation. Could distinguish 'Air/drone strike' from 'Shelling/artillery'
fields_loaded_not_displayed.actor1: in entity properties but only visible in raw property inspection

fields_available_not_loaded.disorder_type: higher-level classification: Political violence, Demonstrations, Strategic developments
fields_available_not_loaded.interaction: numeric code for actor interaction type (e.g. Military vs Civilians)
fields_available_not_loaded.civilian_targeting: flag for events specifically targeting civilians. HIGH VALUE for humanitarian monitoring
fields_available_not_loaded.assoc_actor_1: associated/allied actors (e.g. specific militia name under an umbrella group)
fields_available_not_loaded.inter1: actor type code: State Forces, Rebel Groups, Political Militias, etc.
fields_available_not_loaded.region: ACLED region classification (e.g. Middle East, Eastern Europe)
fields_available_not_loaded.source: reporting source name. Could indicate reliability
fields_available_not_loaded.source_scale: source type: International, National, Subnational, New media, Other
fields_available_not_loaded.iso3: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code. Better for cross-referencing

api_capabilities_not_used.country_filter: filter by specific countries or regions
api_capabilities_not_used.actor_filter: track specific armed groups across events

map_visual.rootCode/eventCode: mapped to conflict subtype and icon

fields_loaded_not_displayed.rootCode: used for subtype grouping but not shown raw
fields_loaded_not_displayed.numSources: stored for diagnostics but not shown directly

fields_available_not_loaded.theme_dimensions: broader GDELT event context and topical dimensions
fields_available_not_loaded.tone: source tone and media sentiment context
fields_available_not_loaded.source_domain: media outlet/domain grouping for provenance analysis

map_visual.intensity: determines polygon color (red/orange/yellow), extrude height (80/40/15 km), outline alpha

fields_loaded_not_displayed.h3Index: stored nowhere after polygon generation — could be used for H3 spatial analysis
fields_loaded_not_displayed.countGood: only used in description text construction
fields_loaded_not_displayed.countBad: only used in description text construction

fields_available_not_loaded._note: GPSJam CSV is minimal (hex, count_good, count_bad). All fields are loaded. The source is fundamentally limited to aggregate counts per H3 cell.

api_capabilities_not_used.historical_dates: CSV files available for past dates. Could show jamming trends over time, animate jamming zone expansion/contraction

source_fetch_auth.method: NASA FIRMS MAP_KEY for historical Area API imports

fields_loaded_not_displayed.brightness: in fireMetaMap, shown in HUD description but not used for map visual
fields_loaded_not_displayed.confidence: in fireMetaMap, shown in HUD description but not used to filter or style dots

fields_available_not_loaded.scan: along-scan pixel size. Indicates detection footprint area
fields_available_not_loaded.acq_date: acquisition date. Could filter by time of day
fields_available_not_loaded.acq_time: acquisition time (HHMM UTC). Could show how recent the detection is
fields_available_not_loaded.satellite: detecting satellite name (Suomi NPP, NOAA-20, etc.)
fields_available_not_loaded.instrument: sensor instrument (VIIRS). Useful if adding MODIS data
fields_available_not_loaded.bright_ti5: brightness temperature in band I5 (11.0 µm). Multi-band analysis for fire characterization
fields_available_not_loaded.daynight: D=day, N=night detection. Night fires have different confidence profiles
fields_available_not_loaded.type: 0=presumed vegetation fire, 1=active volcano, 2=other static land source, 3=offshore. HIGH VALUE — could distinguish wildfires from volcanic activity and industrial flares

api_capabilities_not_used.modis_feed: MODIS instrument fire data (lower resolution but wider swath, longer history)
api_capabilities_not_used.country_feeds: per-country CSV files for faster parsing
api_capabilities_not_used.48h_72h_feeds: extended time windows (48h, 7-day) for trend analysis
api_capabilities_not_used.fire_archive: historical fire data (months/years) for seasonal analysis
api_capabilities_not_used.firms_api: REST API for programmatic queries with bbox, date, confidence filters

legend.note: no subtype rows — single cyan line style

fields_available_not_loaded.owners: cable ownership (consortium of telecom companies). HIGH VALUE — shows who controls infrastructure
fields_available_not_loaded.year: year cable became operational. Age/generation indicator
fields_available_not_loaded.length: cable length in km. Scale indicator
fields_available_not_loaded.rfs: Ready For Service date. More precise than year
fields_available_not_loaded.url: link to detailed cable page on submarinecablemap.com
fields_available_not_loaded.color: cable color code from source (could match their visual style)
fields_available_not_loaded.landing_points: where cable comes ashore — available via separate API. Critical infrastructure chokepoints
fields_available_not_loaded.capacity: design capacity in Tbps. Shows strategic importance

api_capabilities_not_used.landing_points_api: /api/v3/landing-point/landing-point-geo.json — all cable landing stations worldwide. Major infrastructure targets
api_capabilities_not_used.cable_details_api: /api/v3/cable/:id.json — full cable metadata (owners, capacity, RFS, length, landing points)

fields_available_not_loaded._note: Minimal dataset by design. Higher resolution (50m, 10m) variants exist. Additional NaturalEarth datasets available: disputed areas, maritime boundaries, exclusive economic zones (EEZ).

fields_loaded_not_displayed.typeName: stored in meta, used only in HUD description prefix

fields_available_not_loaded.country: country code. Could filter airspace by country
fields_available_not_loaded.icaoClass: ICAO airspace classification (A-G). Different rules for each class
fields_available_not_loaded.activity: active/inactive status. Could hide inactive zones
fields_available_not_loaded.onDemand: whether zone activates on demand. Operational planning value
fields_available_not_loaded.byNotam: whether zone activation is NOTAM-dependent. CRITICAL for operational relevance
fields_available_not_loaded.upperLimit_unit: FL (flight level) vs meters vs feet. Currently converted but unit lost

api_capabilities_not_used.airports_endpoint: /api/airports — worldwide airport data with runways, frequencies, navaids

sources.name: Global Fishing Watch — Dark Vessel Events

legend.note: no subtype rows — single purple diamond icon

map_visual.all: fixed purple warning diamond icon + 40km ellipse

fields_loaded_not_displayed.type: stored as subtype but NOT used to differentiate visuals (all get same icon)
fields_loaded_not_displayed.start: event start time, stored but not shown
fields_loaded_not_displayed.end: event end time, stored but not shown

fields_available_not_loaded.event_info: detailed event metadata (gap duration, distance traveled during gap)
fields_available_not_loaded.distances: distance from shore, distance from port. Contextual risk indicator
fields_available_not_loaded.regions_info: EEZ, RFMO, FAO area where event occurred. Jurisdictional context
fields_available_not_loaded.encounter_info: for encounter events: other vessel ID, distance, duration. Ship-to-ship transfer intelligence
fields_available_not_loaded.vessel_details: full vessel profile: MMSI, IMO, registry, length, tonnage, gear type
fields_available_not_loaded.authorization_status: whether vessel was authorized to fish in that area. Compliance indicator

api_capabilities_not_used._vessel_search_now_used: /v3/vessels/search is consumed by the vessel-enrichment source-fetch operation (registry identity by IMO, cached in core.vessel_enrichment)
api_capabilities_not_used.vessel_tracks: /v3/vessels/{id}/tracks — full AIS track history of a vessel
api_capabilities_not_used.fishing_effort: /v3/4wings/tile — fishing effort heatmap tiles (gridded fishing hours)
api_capabilities_not_used.eez_crossing: vessel movement across Exclusive Economic Zone boundaries

sources.name: Wikimedia Commons — Vessel Photos (by IMO)
sources.refresh: on-demand per entity card / source-fetch, cached 30d (24h for empty lookups)

auth.limits: keyless MediaWiki API; descriptive User-Agent sent, requests are per-click and cached in core.vessel_enrichment

legend.note: no map glyphs — reference enrichment source, rendered inside the vessel entity card

hud.photos[0].url: vessel photo thumbnail in the entity card

fields_loaded_not_displayed.photos[1..]: up to 20 photos per vessel are cached; the card shows the first with a count badge
fields_loaded_not_displayed.descriptionUrl: Commons file page (click-through target of the photo)

fields_available_not_loaded.structured_data: Commons structured data (depicts, coordinates) per file
fields_available_not_loaded.full_resolution: original uploads; only 640px thumbnails are requested

api_capabilities_not_used.wikidata_link: Wikidata ship items (P458 IMO -> P18 image) as an alternative photo resolver
api_capabilities_not_used.deeper_category_walk: only one subcategory level under Category:IMO <imo> is traversed

fields_loaded_not_displayed.datasource: BGP/active-probing/merit-nt — stored but not shown. Could indicate detection method
fields_loaded_not_displayed.startTime: stored but not explicitly shown as time

fields_available_not_loaded.scores: severity scores from each data source
fields_available_not_loaded.asn_level_data: ASN-level outage detection (more granular than country)

api_capabilities_not_used.signals_endpoint: /signals/ — raw BGP/active-probing/darknet signals over time. Could show connectivity trends
api_capabilities_not_used.asn_alerts: /outages/alerts/asn — per-ASN outage alerts (finer granularity than country)
api_capabilities_not_used.historical_data: query outages over custom date ranges for trend analysis

fetch_contract.pagination: limit + offset until provider returns fewer than page size or CLOUDFLARE_OUTAGE_MAX_PAGES is reached
fetch_contract.completeness_status: complete unless page cap or malformed page marks the fetch incomplete

fields_loaded_not_displayed.outageType: stored in properties but never shown in HUD
fields_loaded_not_displayed.outageCause: stored but never shown — could be 'Cable cut', 'Government shutdown', etc. HIGH VALUE
fields_loaded_not_displayed.locations: only first element used, rest ignored. Multiple-location outages are mispositioned

fields_available_not_loaded.linkedUrl: link to Cloudflare Radar page for the outage
fields_available_not_loaded.asNs: multiple affected ASNs (we only read primary asn)

api_capabilities_not_used.traffic_endpoint: /radar/http/timeseries — HTTP traffic volume trends by country/ASN
api_capabilities_not_used.bgp_endpoint: /radar/bgp/ — BGP route announcements, hijacks, leaks. INTELLIGENCE VALUE

sources.name: WiGLE — Wi-Fi Observations
sources.refresh: on street-level viewport below 300 m AGL; backend cache TTL 12h by default

live_contract.completeness: backend-managed offset pagination with persisted tile status; frontend refreshes partial tiles

auth.method: Basic auth API name + API token
auth.limits: free account with provider-side per-account limits; commercial use requires WiGLE commercial license

hud.bssidMasked: loaded on click; raw BSSID is not returned to the browser

fields_loaded_not_displayed.raw_bssid: not sent to frontend; backend stores only masked BSSID for details

not_collected: raw BSSID in frontend render payload
privacy.render_payload: hashed id, lat/lng, security subtype and lastSeen only; backend does not hide cached observations by lastSeen age
privacy.details_payload: SSID, masked BSSID, channel/encryption and timestamps only on click

fields_available_not_loaded.pagination: WiGLE documents searchAfter, but local validation repeated the first page; backend stores provider cursor for diagnostics and advances with first=<cached count>, with persisted tile completeness and provider cooldown
fields_available_not_loaded.bluetooth/cell: WiGLE also has non-Wi-Fi observation classes; not enabled in this layer

api_capabilities_not_used.global_crawl: not supported by product policy; WiGLE is queried only for small street-level viewport tiles
api_capabilities_not_used.ssid_search: could be added as an investigation/search workflow separate from passive map rendering

sources.name: OpenStreetMap Overpass — Critical Infrastructure
sources.refresh: 1h per bbox tile (2°×2° cells, LRU 80 tiles)

fields_available_not_loaded.plant:source: energy source for power plants (nuclear/coal/gas/solar/wind/hydro). HIGH VALUE — we query it but only for power-infra, not critical infra
fields_available_not_loaded.voltage: transmission voltage. Indicates grid importance (400kV = backbone, 110kV = distribution)
fields_available_not_loaded.operator: who operates the facility. Strategic intelligence
fields_available_not_loaded.wikidata: Wikidata ID for cross-referencing with Wikipedia
fields_available_not_loaded.military_type: specific military installation type (airfield, barracks, naval base, range, training area)
fields_available_not_loaded.landuse_details: broader land use context around the facility

api_capabilities_not_used.temporal_queries: Overpass supports date-based queries to see historical OSM state
api_capabilities_not_used.relation_queries: query complex multipolygon relations (e.g. full military base perimeters)
api_capabilities_not_used.tag_combinations: much richer query combinations: amenity=fuel, aeroway=aerodrome, industrial=port, etc.
api_capabilities_not_used.count_queries: get counts without full geometry for quick density checks

sources.name: Overture Maps — Utility Pipeline Geometry
sources.refresh: version-tied DuckDB cache, queried per viewport tile

auth.method: public S3 GeoParquet via DuckDB + httpfs
auth.limits: backend rejects bbox tiles larger than 4 square degrees

map_visual.geometry: pipeline line geometry from Overture/DuckDB, clipped by viewport bbox
map_visual.substance: line color (oil=red, gas=sky blue, water=teal, other=yellow)

fields_loaded_not_displayed.operator: available in source_tags when present; not needed for initial render

fields_available_not_loaded.usage: transmission vs distribution. Transmission = strategic backbone
fields_available_not_loaded.status_tag: proposed/construction/operational/abandoned. Could filter to show only active

sources.name: Overture Maps — Infrastructure Enrichment
sources.refresh: version-tied DuckDB cache (default version 2026-03-18.0). New Overture release = re-download (10-25 min, 200-500 MB)

auth.method: public S3 GeoParquet via DuckDB + httpfs

legend.merged_into: Infrastructure layer (deduped against Overpass within 555m radius)

utility.mapping: served separately by /api/pipelines as Overture viewport line geometry

endpoint_filter.note: /api/infrastructure serves the non-pipeline point types. /api/power-infra serves power subtypes. /api/pipelines serves Overture utility pipeline line geometry by bbox.

map_visual.lat/lng: billboard position for point infrastructure; pipeline and power-line geometry use dedicated line endpoints
map_visual.type: icon selection (same as Overpass infrastructure icons)
map_visual.name: from Overture names.primary field

fields_loaded_not_displayed.filename: S3 parquet filename stored per record for future geometry-on-click feature (NOT implemented yet)
fields_loaded_not_displayed.subtype_original: original Overture subtype before mapping (lost in type conversion)
fields_loaded_not_displayed.class_original: original Overture class before mapping (lost in type conversion)

overture_themes_not_loaded.buildings: 3D building footprints with height. Could enrich military base / refinery visualization with perimeter outlines
overture_themes_not_loaded.places: points of interest: embassies, government buildings, airports, hospitals, ports. HIGH VALUE for intelligence overlay
overture_themes_not_loaded.addresses: address data for facilities. Cross-referencing and identification
overture_themes_not_loaded.transportation: road and rail network with functional classification. Supply routes, logistics corridors, bridge/tunnel chokepoints
overture_themes_not_loaded.land: land use/land cover polygons. Could identify military/industrial zones by area, not just points
overture_themes_not_loaded.water: water bodies, rivers, coastline. Strategic water infrastructure and natural boundaries
overture_themes_not_loaded.divisions: administrative boundaries, geopolitical divisions. Could replace/supplement NaturalEarth borders

map_visual.raster_tile: semi-transparent overlay (alpha 0.6) showing color-coded traffic speed

fields_loaded_not_displayed._note: Frontend uses raster PNG tiles only. Backend also serves PBF vector tiles via /api/traffic/tile/:z/:x/:y but no frontend layer renders them.

fields_available_not_loaded.currentSpeed: current traffic speed per road segment (from PBF vector format)
fields_available_not_loaded.freeFlowSpeed: normal speed when no traffic. Needed to compute delay
fields_available_not_loaded.freeFlowTravelTime: normal travel time. Delay = current - freeflow
fields_available_not_loaded.roadClosure: road closure flag. HIGH VALUE for logistics/military movement analysis
fields_available_not_loaded.incidents: TomTom incidents API has accidents, road works, closures

api_capabilities_not_used.vector_tiles: PBF format gives individual road segments with speed, travel time, closure data
api_capabilities_not_used.incidents_api: real-time traffic incidents: accidents, road closures, construction, weather events
api_capabilities_not_used.routing_api: actual route calculations with traffic-aware ETAs
api_capabilities_not_used.traffic_stats: historical traffic patterns by time of day/week

legend.merged_into: Traffic layer (raw data passed through, not actively visualized)

fields_displayed.note: full API response passed through to frontend but no dedicated visualization layer exists

fields_loaded_not_displayed.results: entire response array is returned but no frontend layer consumes it

fields_available_not_loaded.freeFlowSpeed: normal speed — needed for congestion calculation
fields_available_not_loaded.jamFactor: 0-10 congestion scale. UNIQUE to HERE — high value for traffic intelligence. 10 = complete standstill

api_capabilities_not_used.incidents_api: HERE incidents: accidents, construction, lane restrictions, weather
api_capabilities_not_used.isoline_api: reachability polygons (how far can you go in X minutes)

fields_loaded_not_displayed.quality: stream quality rating — not shown anywhere

fields_available_not_loaded.location.description: full location description (freeway, direction, cross street)

fields_available_not_loaded.player.live.available: whether live stream is actually available. Currently we prefer live but don't check
fields_available_not_loaded.lastUpdatedOn: when webcam last sent an image
fields_available_not_loaded.categories: camera categories (traffic, beach, city, mountain, etc.)
fields_available_not_loaded.url.edit: link to edit webcam on windy.com

api_capabilities_not_used.nearby_search: search within radius of a point (we do use this, but limited)

sources.name: Yahoo Finance + EIA — Oil Prices
sources.provider: Yahoo Finance (real-time) + U.S. Energy Information Administration (official)

legend.note: displayed as floating widget, not map layer

widget.brent.price: current Brent crude price in USD
widget.wti.price: current WTI crude price in USD

fields_loaded_not_displayed.source: yahoo vs eia fallback indicator — not shown to user

fields_available_not_loaded.eia_inventories: US petroleum inventory levels (crude, gasoline, distillates). STRATEGIC VALUE
fields_available_not_loaded.natural_gas_price: Henry Hub natural gas spot price. Complementary commodity

sources.name: Our World in Data — Country Energy Statistics

legend.note: no map visualization — data served via /api/energy endpoint

fields_displayed.note: data available via API but no dedicated map visualization exists

fields_loaded_not_displayed.oil_production: country-level oil production — loaded but not visualized on map
fields_loaded_not_displayed.energy_import_dependency: from World Bank, loaded but not visualized

fields_available_not_loaded._note: OWID CSV has 100+ columns. We load ~12. Selected high-value missing fields:
fields_available_not_loaded.oil_share_energy: share of oil in energy mix. Energy security indicator

sources.name: NASA GIBS — Cloud Cover / True Color

fields_available_not_loaded.night_lights: VIIRS Black Marble night lights imagery. Could show power outages visually
fields_available_not_loaded.sea_surface_temp: MODIS sea surface temperature. Maritime/climate context
fields_available_not_loaded.vegetation_index: MODIS NDVI — green vs barren land. Change detection over time
fields_available_not_loaded.aerosol_optical_depth: atmospheric haze/smoke detection. Correlates with fires and pollution
fields_available_not_loaded.dust_score: dust storm detection. Relevant for military operations

api_capabilities_not_used.date_parameter: date= parameter for historical imagery. Before/after comparison
api_capabilities_not_used.multiple_layers: 100+ layers available: thermal, precipitation, sea ice, ozone, etc.

sources.name: OpenAQ — Air Quality
sources.layer: Not active (code exists but not started)
sources.refresh: code exists but fetchAirQuality not called in service start()

fields_displayed.note: service code exists but is not activated — no frontend layer

fields_available_not_loaded.pm25: PM2.5 particulate matter — primary air quality indicator
fields_available_not_loaded.sensor_values: actual measured values from each sensor at each station
fields_available_not_loaded.measurement_count: number of measurements. Data reliability indicator

api_capabilities_not_used.measurements_endpoint: /v3/measurements — actual measurement values (not just station locations)
api_capabilities_not_used.averages_endpoint: temporal averages (hourly, daily) for trend analysis

fields_displayed.used_for: enriching CelesTrak satellites with sensor metadata for footprint cones

fields_loaded_not_displayed.open: whether satellite data is freely available — not shown

fields_available_not_loaded.sensor_footprints: additional footprint metadata for supported satellites
fields_available_not_loaded.pass_metadata: planned pass and platform metadata where account access allows it
fields_available_not_loaded.sensor_resolution: sensor resolution and platform descriptors for footprint interpretation

fields_available_not_loaded.sentinel1_sar: SAR imagery — see through clouds, detect ships/changes. VERY HIGH VALUE
fields_available_not_loaded.change_detection: compare two dates to detect construction, destruction, troop movements

auth.method: public STAC metadata / product-dependent asset access

fields_available_not_loaded.before_after_context: lower-cadence archive imagery for older incident reconstruction
fields_available_not_loaded.raw_multiband_cog_rendering: not implemented; current product renders browse/thumbnail overlays

auth.method: uses the selected imagery provider credentials already configured in backend
auth.limits: one bounded provider image request or preview download per artifact

fields_available_not_loaded.pixel_level_analysis: not executed by this source; use returned artifact_url with a vision-capable model/tool

fields_available_not_loaded.cameras: 10,000+ cameras across 57 US/Canadian jurisdictions with GeoJSON + stream URLs

fields_available_not_loaded.purpose: flight restriction reason (VIP, military exercise, hazard, etc.)

fields_available_not_loaded.coal_plants: all coal plants worldwide with coordinates, capacity, status, owner
fields_available_not_loaded.pipelines: pipeline routes with capacity, operator, status

fields_displayed.note: generates artistic viewport captures, stored locally

visualization_by_layer._note: Визуализация привязана к слоям (layers), а не к источникам. Один слой может объединять несколько источников. Код иконок: frontend/src/cesium/. Цвета в формате CSS/Tailwind.

military.icon: SVG fighter jet silhouette (swept wings, tail fins)

general.icon: SVG generic airplane silhouette (same as airliner shape)

cargo.icon: SVG cargo ship (rectangular hull + container boxes + keel)

tanker.icon: SVG tanker (rounded hull + circular ports + keel)

passenger.icon: SVG cruise/ferry (rectangular hull + yellow windows + keel)

fishing.icon: SVG fishing boat (triangular hull + mast + fishing line)

military.icon: SVG warship (angular hull + turret tower + keel)

unknown.icon: SVG generic vessel (simple rectangular hull + keel)

dark_vessel.icon: SVG red warning circle (outer ring + inner circle + exclamation mark)

Satellite.render_method: CustomDataSource + Entity API (Billboard + Polyline trail + optional footprint cone)

footprint.type: 8-ray cone from satellite to ground perimeter

recon.icon: SVG amber eye (overrides military if recon flag set)

explosions.icon: SVG red crosshair with explosion burst

battles.halo: same as explosions with orange color

violence.halo: same as explosions with yellow color

Disasters.render_method: CustomDataSource + Entity API (Billboard + Ellipse + optional Polygon for nofly zones)

EQ.halo: Ellipse with radiusKm if present, alert color fill (12% alpha), outline (40% alpha)

Fire.viewport_culling: billboard.show toggled by camera frustum (150ms debounce)

high.icon: SVG radial gradient dot (center white → edge red)

medium.icon: SVG radial gradient dot (center white → edge orange)

low.icon: SVG radial gradient dot (center white → edge yellow)

Airspace.render_method: Dual Primitive (fill polygon + wireframe outline, chunked 300/batch)
Airspace.geometry: Polygon with holes, lowerLimit → min(upperLimit, 20km) extrusion

Infrastructure.render_method: BillboardCollection (points) + GroundPolylinePrimitive (power lines). Tile-based LRU cache (80 tiles, 2°×2°)

power_substation.icon: SVG orange circle with zap symbol

refinery.icon: SVG red factory silhouette with chimney

communication_tower.icon: SVG cyan antenna (vertical mast + guy wires + dot + base)
communication_tower.note: Overture maps communication_tower → power_substation at backend, but frontend has dedicated icon. Overpass can send as native type

aerodrome.icon: SVG gray airplane silhouette (top-down, civilian style)
aerodrome.note: Overture maps aerodrome → military at backend. Frontend has dedicated icon. Risk: civilian airports shown as military

dam.icon: SVG blue waves + rectangular barrier (dam wall + water flows)
dam.note: Overture maps dam/reservoir/water_treatment → desalination at backend. Frontend has dedicated dam icon

Pipeline.render_method: Viewport GroundPolylinePrimitive from Overture/DuckDB line-geometry tiles. Descriptive details are on-demand.

Wi-Fi Observations.render_method: BillboardCollection viewport tiles (0.001° cells, visible below 300 m above ground level; markers clamped to ground with bottom-origin billboard anchoring)
Wi-Fi Observations.refresh_interval: on viewport; backend persists tile cursor/completeness and resumes WiGLE pages under cooldown
Wi-Fi Observations.details: SSID, masked BSSID, channel and encryption load through /api/live/details/wifi/:id after selection

unknown.icon: zinc Wi-Fi glyph with question mark

gap.note: ALL event types currently get this same visual — no differentiation between gap/encounter/loitering

camera.note: all cameras get same icon regardless of source or type

Traffic.note: raster overlay — no individual features or subtypes. Not clickable.

OilPricesWidget.render_method: React floating widget (not a map layer)
OilPricesWidget.note: positioned in UI corner, shows Brent/WTI prices with change indicators

visual_overlap_analysis._note: Анализ дублирующихся данных, пересекающихся визуалов и некорректного переиспользования иконок

data_duplicates.issue: Fire data shows from 3 independent sources simultaneously
data_duplicates.detail: NASA FIRMS показывает ~60K точек пожаров. Одновременно EONET (через Disasters) показывает wildfire events как отдельные маркеры WF. GDACS тоже может показать крупный wildfire с зоной поражения. Один и тот же лесной пожар отображается: (1) как облако красных/оранжевых/желтых точек FIRMS, (2) как маркер WF с иконкой пламени от EONET, (3) как alert от GDACS с ellipse зоной
data_duplicates.recommendation: Объединить под единый узел 'Fires & Wildfires'. FIRMS = heatmap-слой детекции, EONET/GDACS = event-маркеры с зонами поражения. Разные уровни детализации, но пользователь должен видеть их как одну категорию

data_duplicates.issue: Dark vessel detection from 2 independent systems
data_duplicates.detail: Наш алгоритм (AIS gap > 1h) и Global Fishing Watch (gap events dataset) оба детектируют суда, отключающие AIS. Одно судно может одновременно показываться: (1) как красный круг с восклицательным знаком (Dark Vessel, scale 1.1, 50km halo), (2) как фиолетовый ромб (GFW, scale 1.0, 40km halo). Разные иконки, разные цвета, разные размеры для одного явления
data_duplicates.recommendation: Объединить под 'Maritime Anomalies'. Subtype: ais_gap (наш), gfw_gap, gfw_encounter, gfw_loitering. Сейчас GFW вообще не различает типы событий визуально

data_duplicates.issue: Internet outages from 2 sources with different granularity
data_duplicates.detail: IODA (country-level, 300km ellipse) и Cloudflare (ASN-level, 150km ellipse) уже объединены в один слой, но: (1) разный масштаб ellipse для одного severity, (2) Cloudflare outageType/outageCause загружены но НЕ показываются, (3) locations[] у Cloudflare — только первый элемент используется
data_duplicates.recommendation: Показывать outageCause в HUD. Различать визуально country-level (IODA) vs ASN-level (Cloudflare)

data_duplicates.detail: USGS показывает все M2.5+ землетрясения. GDACS показывает крупные землетрясения как alerts с impact radius. EONET может тоже показать geophysical events. Одно сильное землетрясение = до 3 маркеров от разных источников
data_duplicates.recommendation: Backend dedup по proximity + time window. Или приоритезация: GDACS alert (если есть) > USGS point

icon_misuse.issue: Overture backend collapses types that frontend can render distinctly
icon_misuse.detail: Frontend has dedicated icons for communication_tower (cyan antenna), aerodrome (gray plane), dam (blue waves). But Overture service maps: communication→power_substation, airport→military, water→desalination. So Overture-sourced records get WRONG icons, while Overpass-sourced records get CORRECT icons.
affected: communication_tower → collapsed to power_substation (orange zap instead of cyan antenna)
aerodrome → collapsed to military (shield instead of plane). Civilian airports shown as military bases
dam/reservoir/water_treatment → collapsed to desalination (water drop instead of wave/dam)
icon_misuse.recommendation: Fix backend overture.service.ts mapInfraPointType() to return native types: communication_tower, aerodrome, dam. Frontend already has the icons. Add these types to INFRA_ENDPOINT_TYPES set.

visual_inconsistencies.issue: Crosshair icon reused for 3 different data types
visual_inconsistencies.detail: Военные спутники = красный crosshair, scale 1.4. Конфликты ACLED = crosshair в красном/оранжевом/желтом, scale 0.9-1.4. На дальнем зуме при включённых обоих слоях конфликт может быть визуально спутан со спутником
visual_inconsistencies.recommendation: Для конфликтов использовать другую форму: explosion burst для взрывов, crossed swords для сражений, warning triangle для насилия

visual_inconsistencies.detail: При включении всех слоёв красный цвет теряет информационную ценность — всё красное
visual_inconsistencies.recommendation: Разнести по цветовым семействам: конфликты = красный, природные = оранжевый, инфраструктура = теплый жёлтый, аномалии = пурпурный

visual_inconsistencies.detail: Aircraft = 0.7, Vessels = 0.7, Satellites = 1.4-1.8, Conflicts = 0.9-1.4, Fires = 0.25-0.85, Webcams = 0.5, Infrastructure = 1.0. Нет единой системы — объекты разных слоёв не сопоставимы по размеру при одинаковом зуме
visual_inconsistencies.recommendation: Определить 3 размерных класса: small (0.5-0.7), medium (1.0), large (1.4) с понятной семантикой

layers_that_could_share_visual_type.shared_pattern: billboard с rotation по heading + polyline trail за объектом
layers_that_could_share_visual_type.note: Все три уже используют этот паттерн, но с разной реализацией: Aircraft = BillboardCollection, Vessel = Entity+PathGraphics, Satellite = Entity+Polyline. Визуально паттерн единый

layers_that_could_share_visual_type.shared_pattern: billboard иконка + ellipse halo с radius, coded by severity
layers_that_could_share_visual_type.note: Все 5 слоёв используют Billboard + Ellipse. Различаются иконкой и цветом. Можно унифицировать HUD-панель для всех event-type объектов

layers_that_could_share_visual_type.shared_pattern: GroundPolylinePrimitive / PolylineGeometry, 2px line, color by substance
layers_that_could_share_visual_type.note: Три типа линейной инфраструктуры. Визуально одинаковый паттерн, различаются цветом

layers_that_could_share_visual_type.shared_pattern: extruded polygon fill + wireframe outline, color coded by severity
layers_that_could_share_visual_type.note: Jamming = H3 hexagons, Airspace = irregular polygons. Но визуальный паттерн одинаковый: полупрозрачная стена

high_value_unused_fields: OpenSky: squawk (transponder emergency codes — 7700/7600/7500)
OpenSky: category (aircraft type classification — far better than name heuristic)
OpenSky: vertical_rate (climb/descent indicator)
AISStream: vessel Name, CallSign, IMO number (we only show MMSI)
AISStream: NavigationalStatus (at anchor, moored, aground, man overboard!)
AISStream: Destination + ETA (intelligence gold)
AISStream: MaximumStaticDraught (cargo load indicator)
CelesTrak: COUNTRY_CODE, LAUNCH_DATE, CLASSIFICATION_TYPE, RCS_SIZE
USGS: depth (shallow=destructive), tsunami flag, PAGER alert, felt reports
GDACS: population_affected, resources (reports/satellite imagery links)
ACLED: civilian_targeting flag, interaction codes, admin1/2/3 granularity
FIRMS: type (vegetation fire vs volcano vs industrial flare)
FIRMS: daynight (night detections have different confidence)
Submarine Cables: owners, capacity, landing_points
Cloudflare: outageCause (cable cut, government shutdown, etc.)
GFW: encounter_info (ship-to-ship transfers), vessel_tracks, fishing_effort heatmaps
HERE: jamFactor (0-10 congestion scale — unique metric)
OpenAQ: actual PM2.5/PM10/O3/NO2 sensor values (code exists but service not started)
NASA GIBS: night_lights (VIIRS Black Marble — shows power outages)
OpenAIP: byNotam flag, icaoClass, activity status
Overture Maps: buildings, places, transportation (only using infrastructure subset)
data_loaded_but_no_map_visual: OWID Energy (12 country-level fields loaded, no choropleth map)
HERE Traffic (full API response passed through, no vector layer)
OpenAQ Air Quality (service code exists, not activated)
